## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Goodcall and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content production, and website optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Miscommunication on content publishing process led to delays; GrowthX manually creates unique content rather than using templates](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [20 content refreshes completed and live; 7 backlinks added to Goodcall from client websites](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [New content clusters approved: AI answering service, best answering service, appointment scheduling software](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Need for more specific USPs and target audience info from Goodcall to optimize content creation](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Publishing Process

  - [Misalignment on content creation method: GrowthX manually writes unique content vs. Goodcall's expectation of template-based approach](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [20 content refreshes completed and live on the site](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [7 backlinks added to Goodcall from client websites](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [New content clusters approved: AI answering service, best answering service, appointment scheduling software](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Content will be categorically organized in the blog section rather than as separate clusters](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

### Website Health and Optimization

  - [Issues identified with heading structure (H2s, H3s) in existing content](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Goodcall has capability to programmatically update content across multiple pages](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide comprehensive list of health improvements needed](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Target Audience and USP Refinement

  - [GrowthX needs more specific Unique Selling Points (USPs) for different verticals (e.g., salons, small businesses, plumbers, medical offices)](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [Request for information on enterprise clients and their specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=2081.0)
  - [Focus on creating content around AI answering services integrated with platforms like Genesis and Five9](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)

### Keyword Strategy

  - ["Tools" keyword cluster identified as high-potential: 2,100 keywords with 25,000 search volume](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [Emphasis on experimenting with different content formats and topics to validate hypotheses](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to publish new articles by tomorrow (Feb 28) and March 1st](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Goodcall to provide more detailed USPs for different target audiences and verticals](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=2228.0)
  - [Goodcall to share insights on enterprise clients and their specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)
  - [GrowthX to create content strategy around enterprise-level AI answering services integrated with platforms](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [Continue experimenting with different content formats and monitor performance](https://fathom.video/share/JigxnybzKyw2P5c_ciEsMbALG7zWoHne?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
